headline: Detective at McKinley County Sheriff's Office | Silversmith, Osborne Metalworks
summary: Detective with the McKinley County Sheriff's Office in Gallup, New Mexico. Twenty-two years with the office, sixteen as a detective. Criminal Justice, Western New Mexico University; Law Enforcement Academy, 2004. Off the clock I run Osborne Metalworks, a one-man silversmithing shop working sterling and Southwestern stone.
